Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3652 "ZEPPELIN-9000-3652" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $9000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zeppelin.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9000 which: 1. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $9040 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Sets $DD01 (CIA#2 Port B) to $3B (this allows the game to run properly) 3. Jumps to the entry point at $3652 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code)
The loading screen is from the disk version.
